name: WhiteMagic
description: AI memory, cognitive upgrades, and more — 860 callable tools (28 Gana meta-tools in PRAT mode, 832 tools in classic mode), tiered memory with 6D holographic coordinates, HNSW semantic search, ethical governance with an 8-stage security pipeline, MandalaOS compartments, and polyglot accelerators in 7 languages (Rust, Zig, Julia, Elixir, Haskell, Koka, Go). Free and open (MIT). Local-first, no telemetry.

skills.name: Memory Management
skills.description: Store, recall, search, and manage tiered memories with 6D holographic coordinates and Galactic Map lifecycle. Supports SHORT_TERM, LONG_TERM, PATTERN, and CORE memory tiers.
examples: Store an architectural decision as a long-term memory

skills.name: Tool Dispatch & Orchestration
skills.description: Unified dispatch pipeline for 860 callable tools with input sanitization, rate limiting, RBAC, circuit breakers, and maturity gates. Supports PRAT mode (28 Gana meta-tools) and classic mode (832 tools). 8-stage security pipeline — defense in depth against prompt injection, path traversal, and supply chain attacks.
examples: Call any of the 860 callable tools via unified API
Route tools through PRAT Gana meta-tool interface

skills.name: Ethical Governance
skills.description: Dharma Rules Engine with YAML-driven policies, Karma Ledger for side-effect auditing, Harmony Vector health metrics, and Homeostatic Loop auto-correction.
examples: Evaluate the ethical implications of an action
Check Karma Ledger for side-effect mismatches

skills.name: System Introspection
skills.description: Unified read-only introspection across all subsystems. Capability matrix shows 25 subsystems and 28 active fusions. Self-awareness in one call — health, capabilities, energy, recent actions.
examples: Get full system snapshot via Gnosis
Check capability matrix and suggest next fusions

skills.name: Agent Coordination
skills.description: Multi-agent coordination: agent registry, task distribution, pipeline creation, voting, session handoff, and Redis-backed Gan Ying event bus.
examples: Register a new agent with capabilities
